message:
Add missing dependencies to improve bead graph structure

Added 4 semantically correct dependencies identified by bv --robot-suggest:
- bd-6e9.8 → bd-v6y (grapheme helpers use width calculation)
- bd-2gx → bd-10i.11 (quality gates depend on testing suite)
- bd-e211 → bd-2uk (text wrapping needs base Text type)
- bd-6e9.8 → bd-16k (grapheme code tested by unicode corpus)

Skipped false positives:
- bd-1ho.1 → bd-v6y (would create cycle - transitive path exists)
- bd-2uk → bd-2gx (reversed - implementations shouldn't depend on quality gates)
- bd-10i.10.3 → bd-10i (child shouldn't depend on parent epic)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
